name: work-share-monorepo
description: Work Share - VS Code extension with API server for team collaboration

scripts.install:all: npm run install:plugin && npm run install:server
scripts.build: npm run build:plugin && npm run build:server
scripts.clean: npm run clean:plugin && npm run clean:server
scripts.lint: npm run lint:plugin && npm run lint:server
scripts.docker:restart: npm run docker:down && npm run docker:up
scripts.try: npm run try:setup && npm run try:launch
scripts.try:setup: npm run build:plugin && npm start && echo 'Waiting for server to start...' && sleep 3
scripts.try:launch:
echo '
✅ Server is running at http://localhost:3000
✅ Plugin is built and ready

📝 Next step: Press F5 in VS Code to launch Extension Development Host
' && code .
